name: jsonl-tool-result-legacy-text-salvage
comment: Regression case: the pre-fix asText()/_as_text() kept text from ANY nested block with a string 'text' key, not just type:"text" blocks. A block shaped {type:"foo",text:"hi"} must still contribute "hi" to the legacy 'text' field (byte-identical to 0.1.0), and that same text must ride along on the resulting 'unknown' part so a parts-reading renderer and a text-only one never disagree about whether the block said something.
